case.title: MACDONALD v. SUPERIOR COURT OF CALIFORNIA, MARIN COUNTY

opinion.h1: MACDONALD v. SUPERIOR COURT OF CALIFORNIA, MARIN COUNTY, 467 U.S. 1269 (1984)
opinion.p: David MACDONALD v. SUPERIOR COURT OF CALIFORNIA, MARIN COUNTY (Louis P. Mountanos, Real Party in Interest), No. 83-1874.
Supreme Court of the United States
The appeal is dismissed pursuant to Rule 53 of this Court.[ MacDonald v. Superior Court of California, Marin County 467 U.S. 1269 (1984) ]
